# Slay the Spire

<!-- generated by scripts/generate-readmes.py from pack metadata — edit the pack, not this file -->

Community game pack registry for Slay the Spire. Each available (source, target) language pair lives in its own folder below.

- **Process name**: `SlayTheSpire`
- **Available pairs**: 1

## Available packs

| Pair folder | Language pair | Contributor | Entries |
|-------------|---------------|-------------|---------|
| [`en-ja/`](en-ja/) | English → Japanese | director-sample (seed) | 66 |

## Contributing

See the top-level [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the PR flow. Drop your exported `.playto-pack` into a `<source>-<target>/` folder here — no README required, both the game-level and pair-level READMEs are regenerated automatically on push to main.
